creator: godevilove@ya.ru
text:
====> Running Q/A tests (stage-qa)
Warning: 'lib/thunarx-2/thunar-archive-plugin.so' is not stripped consider trying INSTALL_TARGET=install-strip or using ${STRIP_CMD}
Error: /usr/local/lib/thunarx-2/thunar-archive-plugin.so is linked to /usr/local/lib/libexo-1.so.0 from x11/libexo but it is not declared as a dependency
Warning: you need USE_XFCE+=libexo
Error: /usr/local/lib/thunarx-2/thunar-archive-plugin.so is linked to /usr/local/lib/libgtk-x11-2.0.so.0 from x11-toolkits/gtk20 but it is not declared as a dependency
Warning: you need USE_GNOME+=gtk20
Error: /usr/local/lib/thunarx-2/thunar-archive-plugin.so is linked to /usr/local/lib/libgdk-x11-2.0.so.0 from x11-toolkits/gtk20 but it is not declared as a dependency
Warning: you need USE_GNOME+=gtk20
Error: /usr/local/lib/thunarx-2/thunar-archive-plugin.so is linked to /usr/local/lib/libcairo.so.2 from graphics/cairo but it is not declared as a dependency
Warning: you need USE_GNOME+=cairo
Error: /usr/local/lib/thunarx-2/thunar-archive-plugin.so is linked to /usr/local/lib/libfontconfig.so.1 from x11-fonts/fontconfig but it is not declared as a dependency
Warning: you need LIB_DEPENDS+=libfontconfig.so:x11-fonts/fontconfig
Error: /usr/local/lib/thunarx-2/thunar-archive-plugin.so is linked to /usr/local/lib/libfreetype.so.6 from print/freetype2 but it is not declared as a dependency
Warning: you need LIB_DEPENDS+=libfreetype.so:print/freetype2
